title: Coinbase is ‘worthless' reckons renowned options trader Nassim Taleb
text: Well-known options trader and mathemetician Nassim Nicholas Taleb, who released the influential book The Black Swan: The Impact of the Highly Improbable in 2007, has called Nasdaq-quoted cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase “worthless” in a recent Twitter missive. While stopping short of drawing analogies to competing exchange FTX, which recently collapsed amid a litany of criminal accusations, Taleb noted that Coinbase is “cash-flow negative with a grisly future (even if crypto comes back),” before bluntly stating that “the company of worthless”.

title: Coinbase chief product officer to step down as company reorganizes business
text: Coinbase Global Inc. COIN, -4.08% disclosed Wednesday that its chief product officer, Surojit Chatterjee, will step down from that position as of Nov. 30, though he will stay in an advisory role at Coinbase at least through Feb. 3, 2023.
